companies.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
companies.reason: Palantir recently secured a substantial contract with the US Department of Defense. The deal, valued at over $100 million, is part of an effort to enhance data analytics capabilities for defense applications, which has significantly boosted investor interest and highlighted the company's role in national security.

companies.name: Figma (acquired by Adobe)
companies.reason: Figma is making waves as part of Adobe’s strategy to enhance its creative cloud offerings. The integration of Figma's design collaboration tools has been well-received in the market, driving discussions about how Adobe plans to leverage it to further expand its market share in the design software industry.

companies.name: Coursera Inc.
companies.reason: Coursera has recently partnered with several leading universities to offer new certification programs aimed at in-demand industries like AI and data science. This initiative is gaining attention for addressing the skills gap in the workforce, prompting a positive response from both investors and educators in the tech sector.
